title: 全球最臭名昭著的论坛，发现了 AI 最重要的「思考」能力 | 原文
content: The article reports on the controversial release of Claude Opus 4.7, which has quickly drawn criticism online. Users note that the new tokenizer inflates token counts by 1.0 to 1.35 times, causing quicker consumption of usage limits. Creator Boris Cherny said the company will raise quotas to compensate. The piece also highlights concerns about the model’s tendency to appear overly persistent and unresponsive, sparking debate about its design and user experience.

title: 特朗普计划在阿拉斯加北极野生动物保护区举行石油租赁拍卖
content: Former President Donald Trump intends to hold a competitive oil lease auction in Alaska’s Arctic Wildlife Refuge. The proposed sale would open mining rights to the region’s natural resources, a move that has drawn criticism from conservationists and environmental groups concerned about the fragile Arctic ecosystem. The auction would still need federal approval and would likely face legal and regulatory hurdles.

title: 把 chromium 浏览器改造成 AI 时代的终端 crTerm
content: crTerm is a Chromium‑based terminal for Linux that turns the browser into a modern CLI tool. It is free to download as a .deb package from the project’s release page. Features include chrome‑style tab groups, vertical tab support, and built‑in theme configuration. Issues and support are handled via the GitHub issues page.

This scramble reflects the urgent push to secure financial benefits before the policy ends.

content: Indian fintech companies are urging Anthropic to grant them access to the Mythos research model. These firms cite the model’s potential to enhance their services and competitiveness. Anthropic has not yet opened the model to the public, leading to growing impatience among the Indian financial sector. The companies’ requests highlight a broader demand for cutting‑edge AI tools in fintech, emphasizing the urgency of accessing newer technologies.

title: 微信当记事本的调查后续: 搞了个用微信 clawbot 当记事本的项目
content: See the project “clawbot notebook” on GitHub. It turns WeChat into a simple note‑taking tool: after scanning a QR code you can send messages to the clawbot, which saves them as local Markdown files. The solution is single‑file, privacy‑friendly, database‑free, and includes CLI and desktop versions. No extra app is needed, and notes can be backed up by copying the folder. Try it from the releases.

title: The System Behind Self-Driving: Waymo’s Dmitri Dolgov
content: Waymo delivers hundreds of thousands of fully autonomous rides weekly by building a full system for training, evaluating, and deploying self‑driving vehicles. In an interview, Waymo Co‑CEO Dmitri Dolgov explains how sensor fusion of LiDAR, radar, and cameras, simulation, critic models, and AI decision‑making create true autonomy, distinguishing it from driver‑assist. The discussion also covers global scaling needs and how recent AI advances are shaping the future of autonomous mobility.

title: 全球贸易失衡仅仅是“一个巨大的顺差”吗？
content: Global trade imbalances are frequently described as a single large surplus, but this reductionist view overlooks the complexity and varying causes of the disparities. The article examines how different regions experience trade surpluses and deficits, the roles of exchange rates, economic structures, and policy decisions, and the broader implications for international economic stability. It argues that the imbalance is a multifaceted issue requiring nuanced analysis rather than a simplistic surplus narrative.

title: AI 时代，开源项目安全性如何保证
content: Open-source projects traditionally benefited from many eyes that spotted security flaws early, but today AI tools rapidly scan for vulnerabilities and map potential attack paths. This shift raises questions about safeguarding code when AI can identify weaknesses faster. Meanwhile, Anthropic is negotiating with the U.S. government to allow access to its Mythos model, and new AI systems—codenamed “永恒之红” and “永恒之绿”—are reportedly underway.

title: 世界模型五大门派，围攻光明顶
content: The article explains how AI companies are pursuing “world models” to move beyond large language models’ limits. It outlines five main approaches: (1) JEPA, which predicts abstract latent dynamics; (2) spatial reconstruction, exemplified by World Labs’ explicit 3‑D scene generation; (3) simulation‑based learning via DeepMind’s Genie and Dreamer, creating realistic virtual environments; (4) Nvidia’s Cosmos platform, providing data processing and training tools; and (5) active inference from neuroscience, offering object‑centric, probabilistic reasoning. The piece argues these methods complement each other and may eventually merge to achieve true AI that interacts with the physical world.

title: 具身智能领域首个国际标准成功立项
content:
我国在国际标准化组织成功立项具身智能领域全球首项国际标准《人形机器人数据集》，并推动成立了首个由我国专家担任召集人的工作组。 当前，美国、日本、欧盟等主要经济体都将人形机器人纳入国家科技战略，争相布局研发与应用。

title: 黄仁勋呼吁中美加强 AI 合作，出口管制难遏中国算力
content: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang said the recent breakthrough of Anthropic’s Mythos security model shows that the United States should cooperate with China on AI research to agree on safe usage. He argues that dialogue and research collaboration are the safest approach, noting that current trade and security tensions hinder essential partnerships. Over the past year, Huang has pressured the Trump administration to ease export controls, arguing that China’s abundant energy, mature chip manufacturing, and strong processing capability keep its computing power from being constrained.

title: 赴美游客大幅减少，中国有望成全球最大旅游经济体
content: China’s tourism grew 9.9% last year, more than twice the global average and far outpacing the United States’ 0.9% rise. The increase was driven by over 10% growth in foreign‑visitor spending in China, while U.S. visitor spending fell nearly 5%. If both countries maintain similar rates, China could become the world’s largest tourism economy by the end of this decade.

title: 阿里发布世界模型 HappyOyster，与谷歌 Genie3 竞争
content: Alibaba introduced the real‑time world‑model product HappyOyster on April 16. Developed by the Alibaba ATH Innovation Department, it uses a native multimodal architecture for unified audio‑video generation and understanding. The system offers two key capabilities—roaming and directing—allowing users to construct AI‑generated digital worlds instantly. HappyOyster is positioned in the emerging world‑simulation arena, comparable to Google’s Genie3.
eventKey: 阿里发布世界模型-happyoyster-与谷歌-genie3
normalizedTitle: 阿里发布世界模型 happyoyster 与谷歌 genie3 竞争

title: 曝网盘海外影视资源迎来史上最严清查
content: Starting April 10, a strict crackdown on overseas film and TV content on cloud storage services began, with Quark Disk combing through user‑stored media. Many public sharing links were disabled, prompting popular content reposters to urge downloads or transfers, and some overseas drama creators paused uploads or removed their libraries. In May 2025, four ministries launched the “Swords 2025” initiative, targeting six areas—audio‑visual works, animation and games, software, network storage and distribution, online sales, and streaming devices—to enforce copyright compliance.

title: 为什么长兄长姐更聪明
content: Eldest siblings tend to be more intelligent because they usually receive more responsibility early in life, encouraging greater cognitive development and problem‑solving skills. They often serve as role models for younger brothers and sisters, which motivates parents to invest extra educational resources in them. This heightened attention, combined with the challenges of managing younger siblings, helps elders develop advanced reasoning abilities and academic performance.
